symptom_vector: Pod killed, forceful pod termination, container killed, pod eviction

reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [cartservice] (From Ground Truth instance field)
Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [pod_processes] in Metric data (From GT key_observations)
Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [client_error, client_error_ratio, error, error_ratio] in Metric (From GT key_observations)
Step 4: Check Observation - Found keyword [request, response] in Metric (From GT key_observations)
Step 5: Derive Root Cause - Based on pod kill fault category and missing pod_processes metrics, determined cause is [client_error,client_error_ratio,error,error_ratio,pod_processes,request,response]

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Metric value drops to zero indicating pod termination
critical_checks.instruction: Search for metric [pod_processes] for cartservice pods during fault window

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Error metrics spike during pod termination
critical_checks.instruction: Check if [client_error] or [client_error_ratio] metrics show anomalies for cartservice
Search for [error] or [error_ratio] metrics related to cartservice

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Request/response patterns change during pod kill
critical_checks.instruction: Analyze [request] and [response] metrics for cartservice during fault period
Check trace data for [request_proportion_anomalies] involving frontend->cartservice calls
